series_metadata.series_description: Claim files containing medical records, correspondence, claim applications and authorizations.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims prior August 25, 2006 shall be disposed of ten (10) years from date of last activity. "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from date of last activity. ; Paper: "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims prior August 25, 2006 shall be disposed of ten (10) years from date of last activity. "lost time" and/or "medical only" claims August 25, 2006 should be deleted/destroyed five (5) years from date of last activity
